overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a coastal fishing village in a video game, featuring wooden docks, fish drying racks, and a large traditional sail structure. The scene is set during a warm afternoon with clear skies, showcasing high-quality game engine graphics with cinematic lighting.

wooden pole structures with hanging fish drying in the sun

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a first-person view walking through a traditional fishing village. Wooden docks extend over the water on the left while fish drying racks line the right side of the dirt path. A worker is visible ahead near the platforms, and a large triangular sail structure stands in the distance against a backdrop of rocky cliffs and clear skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: passing the fish drying racks where a worker tends to the catch

events.description: passing by the NPC worker standing at the fish drying racks on the right

agents.ego_description: walking past the worker who is tending to the fish hanging on the drying racks

notable_agents.action: standing at the drying racks, handling the hanging fish with both hands

entered.detail: small wooden tripod stand with hanging items positioned near the path

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the worker who is actively handling fish on the drying racks to the right. The wooden docks fall behind on the left as the path continues between the racks and the cliff face. The large sail structure grows larger in the center view while the rocky cliff face looms closer on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront path approaching the large fishing sail structure

events.description: exiting the village interior into the open waterfront with clear view of the sail and water

agents.ego_description: continuing along the waterfront dirt path toward the large traditional fishing sail structure

entered.detail: tall green reeds and grasses growing along the water's edge
wooden frame structures standing in the shallow water near the shore
hazy mountain range visible across the water in the distance

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up to the waterfront as the village structures fall behind. The camera approaches the large triangular sail structure that dominates the center view, with wooden fishing weirs visible in the water on the left. The rocky cliff recedes into the distance on the right while reeds line the water's edge and distant mountains appear across the bay.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a traditional fishing village that gradually opens into a wide coastal vista. It begins on a dirt path flanked by wooden docks on the left and fish drying racks on the right, with a large triangular sail structure visible in the distance against rocky cliffs. As the camera moves forward, it passes a worker handling fish on the racks while the cliff face looms closer on the right and the sail structure grows in the center view. The scene then expands toward the waterfront as the village structures fall behind, revealing wooden fishing weirs in the water to the left. Finally, the camera approaches the dominating sail structure as the cliffs recede, opening the view to reeds along the water's edge and distant mountains across the bay.
